title: Phlomoides hajastanica
taxonomy: Phlomoides hajastanica is classified within the family Lamiaceae and belongs to the genus Phlomoides. It is a species of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Armenia. Further classification places Phlomoides hajastanica within the order Lamiales, which includes a wide range of flowering plants. The plant is closely related to other members of the Lamiaceae family, such as mint and basil. Classification at the species level indicates that Phlomoides hajastanica is a distinct and unique species within the Phlomoides genus.
